rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §254.0911 governs campaign finance report contents for judicial officeholders. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 254.0911. ADDITIONAL CONTENTS OF REPORTS BY CERTAIN JUDICIAL OFFICEHOLDERS.
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict detected.
